gt_caption: This screenshot shows a news article titled "How Much of Your Data Would You Trade for a Free Cookie?" discussing an artist's experiment testing New Yorkers' willingness to share personal information for homemade cookies, with images of cookies featuring social media logos.
This digital display showcases a responsive WordPress website design, demonstrating how the layout adapts across various devices, including desktops, laptops, tablets, and smartphones.

This illustration depicts two people working on a large, red "QUERY" interface, with one person riding a bicycle to power it and the other using a magnifying glass to inspect it, set against a backdrop of data charts and clouds.

This poster promotes a financial learning platform, showcasing courses, games, and crypto ideas, with a smartphone screen displaying the website "Wall Street Survivor" featuring a stock market simulation game.

This photo depicts a person working at a desk with a computer displaying a "Consult Advice" webpage, surrounded by office supplies, a coffee cup, and a plant, suggesting a focused work or study environment.
This photo shows a person holding a tablet displaying a "Therapy Search" interface, with a virtual keyboard visible, in what appears to be a casual indoor setting.
This screenshot shows the Gmail login and account creation page, offering options to sign in or create a new Google account.
This screenshot displays a website for a coffee shop, "Coffee Time," featuring a menu with special offers, coffee images, and promotional text.
This screenshot from *The Cut* highlights three women who are changing the art industry, featuring their portraits and the article's title.
This digital display shows a website homepage with the theme "HARMONY," featuring abstract colorful graphics and text explaining the concept of peace in a political context.
